name: Ethiopia
headline: Ethiopia CARRY-FORWARD CONFIRMATION at 4.7 / Critical — rotation backfill cycle (11 days since May 7 last assessment). Floor-adjacent entity. Tigray humanitarian crisis ongoing; aid obstruction documented. New May 18 context: South Sudan Akobo displacement spillover — IRC reports 100,000 South Sudanese fleeing to Ethiopia. Ethiopia's role as a receiving country for displaced persons under the Akobo emergency adds an EMP-dimension context (hosting under-resource-pressure). Not a positive scoring event (hosting refugees does not score positively against active conflict-conduct floor — methodology requires both conditions to be assessed separately), but documentation expansion warranted.

EMP.rationale: Sustained. Hosting 100,000 South Sudanese displaced persons under-resource-pressure adds context but does not change dimensional anchor.

evidence.summary: IRC May 2026: 100,000 South Sudanese displaced persons fleeing Akobo emergency into Ethiopia. Ethiopia hosting under-resource-pressure.
Carry-forward: Tigray humanitarian crisis ongoing; Amhara/Oromia/Tigray multi-region conflict trajectory sustained; no rehabilitative event.

keyEvidence: Tigray humanitarian crisis ongoing; aid obstruction documented.
South Sudan Akobo spillover: 100,000 displaced into Ethiopia.
rationale: Rotation backfill cycle. No rehabilitative event. South Sudan Akobo spillover documented as EMP-dimension context (hosting under-resource-pressure) but does not change dimensional anchor. Math: (1.5+1.5+1+1+1.5+1+1+1)/8 = 9.5/8 = 1.1875 → ((1.1875-1)/4)*100 = 4.69 → 4.7.
boundaryWatchResolution: Not a boundary case. 4.7 sits within Critical band well below 20/21 boundary.
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
